checks.name: 8 canonical career stages
checks.detail: stages = [student, graduate, postgraduate, internship-seeker, early-career, mid-career, senior-leadership, executive]

checks.name: every stage → a defined experience
checks.detail: student → launchpad (tab=fresher-hub, available=true) · graduate → launchpad (tab=fresher-hub, available=true) · postgraduate → launchpad (tab=fresher-hub, available=true) · internship-seeker → launchpad (tab=fresher-hub, available=true) · early-career → launchpad (tab=fresher-hub, available=true) · mid-career → command-center (tab=dashboard, available=true) · senior-leadership → leadership-studio (tab=leadership-studio, available=true) · executive → executive-studio (tab=executive-studio, available=true)

checks.name: experience → representative stage → experience round-trip
checks.detail: launchpad → early-career → launchpad · command-center → mid-career → command-center · leadership-studio → senior-leadership → leadership-studio · executive-studio → executive → executive-studio

checks.name: allowedExperiences widens with seniority (2→2→3→4)
checks.detail: null:2 · student:2 · graduate:2 · postgraduate:2 · internship-seeker:2 · early-career:2 · mid-career:2 · senior-leadership:3 · executive:4

checks.name: deriveStage maps existing-user signals (null when nothing derivable)
isCareerStage / isExperienceId guard against junk input
checks.detail: valid accepted; unknown / empty / null / wrong-type rejected

checks.name: careerLaunchpad flag exists & defaults OFF
checks.detail: registered=true · enabled=false (expected false in this process)

checks.name: one user = one record (column on career_seeker_profiles; no new table)
checks.detail: migration 20260627_career_stage.sql is ALTER-only; persist UPSERTs the existing PK row

checks.name: experience switching is authorization-bounded (no escalation)
checks.detail: early-career +pref(executive-studio) → launchpad · executive +pref(command-center) → command-center · mid-career +pref(none) → command-center · null-stage +pref(none) → launchpad (want launchpad, NOT command-center) · every stage default ∈ its allowed set: true
